name: Potato Cake (Pinza Di Patate)
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter an 8-inch cake pan with a removable bottom.
2. Fill a large saucepan two-thirds full with water and add potatoes. Bring to a boil.
3. Boil gently until the potatoes are tender.
4. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175C).
5. Peel and mash the hot potatoes.
6. Beat the eggs with salt in a large bowl.
7. Beat in melted butter and olive oil.
8. Add mashed potatoes, Parmesan cheese, and flour; mix well.
9. Pour the potato mixture into the buttered pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
10. Brush the top with beaten egg yolk.
11. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until the top is golden.
12. Unmold the potato cake and place on a warm platter.
13. Serve immediately. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
